summary: Website project for CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust and HOPE (Helping Outstanding Pupils in Education) organizations. Building Draft Version 23 based on Version 5 with updated logos (CETA and HOPE) swapped into their original positions in the navbar, hero, and footer.
architectural_notes: Project uses versioned drafts; Version 5 is the stable base, Version 23 builds on it with logo updates.
Logos appear in three locations: navbar, hero, and footer.

existing_features.title: Replace the existing CETA logo image with the newly uploaded CETA-3.png (CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust circular seal in dark red) in the navbar (Navigation.tsx), hero section (HeroSection.tsx), and footer (Footer.tsx), preserving the same size, position, and alt text as the previous logo in each location.

Replace the existing HOPE logo image with the newly uploaded HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png (HOPE – Helping Outstanding Pupils in Education circular logo with cupped hands) in the navbar (Navigation.tsx), hero section (HeroSection.tsx), and footer (Footer.tsx), preserving the same size, position, and alt text as the previous logo in each location.

Save CETA-3.png and HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated/ and reference them from Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx using their respective static asset paths.
